articles.title: 8 STRATEGY CONCEPTS EVERY PM SHOULD KNOW
articles.summary: Strong product strategies combine several sources of competitive advantage. Those advantages must be chosen carefully and revisited as the market changes.

articles.title: IS "JOBS" A FOUR-LETTER WORD?
articles.summary: AI is changing Silicon Valley's definition of ambition from building large teams to needing fewer people. This shift could make hiring look inefficient and layoffs look impressive.

articles.title: YOUR AI SHOULD KEEP A DIARY
articles.summary: An AI activity log makes invisible work easier to review and improve. It helps users delegate more effectively, preserve context, and build stronger AI habits.

articles.title: WHO'S AFRAID OF CHINESE MODELS?
articles.summary: Chinese models are less of an economic threat than restrictive US AI policies. America should expand access to powerful models and support open innovation.

articles.title: WHAT MR. JAMBO AND LEVI'S CAN TEACH US ABOUT LISTENING TO CUSTOMERS
articles.summary: Leaders often reshape customer feedback to confirm existing beliefs. Teams should test their assumptions and consider that customers may mean exactly what they say.

articles.title: THE DENOMINATOR THAT MATTERS
articles.summary: Successful AI adoption requires technical understanding, problem knowledge, evolving practices, and trust. Without a credible social contract, resistance is rational.

articles.title: THE POWER OF “WHY?”
articles.summary: Requirements often prescribe solutions instead of identifying real needs. Asking “why” and testing small increments helps teams preserve options and find simpler answers.

articles.title: THIS IS HOW TO LIVE A GOOD LIFE
articles.summary: A good life is built through repeated action, not insight alone. We become better by practicing virtue, pursuing meaningful goals, and investing in relationships.

articles.title: THE RUDE DUCK: WHAT ARE YOU AVOIDING?
articles.summary: Fear often hides behind reasonable excuses.

articles.title: AI'S NEXT WINNERS WON'T JUST BE THE FRONTIER LABS
articles.summary: AI's value is spreading beyond frontier labs.
